summary: Iteration 63: Testing Conto Lavoro DDT feature for subcontracting (verniciatura, zincatura, sabbiatura). All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: CL section shows existing entries with PDF/Email buttons, 'Nuovo C/L' dialog contains full form with Tipo, Fornitore dropdown, RAL field (conditional), Causale, Righe table with add/remove, Note, and submit button. PDF generation confirmed via direct API call.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console due to span elements inside select/tbody (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)

backend_api_tests.POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro: PASS - Creates CL with tipo, fornitore_nome, fornitore_id, ral, righe, causale_trasporto, note
backend_api_tests.POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro (z: PASS - Creates zincatura CL without RAL
backend_api_tests.POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{c: PASS - Returns valid PDF (14KB+, starts with %PDF)
backend_api_tests.PUT /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl: PASS - Updates status and sets data_invio
backend_api_tests.POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{c: PASS - Sends DDT email to supplier (via Resend)
PASS - Returns 400 when supplier has no email
backend_api_tests.GET /api/commesse/{cid}/ops: PASS - Returns conto_lavoro array with all fields (cl_id, tipo, fornitore_nome, righe, stato, ral, etc.)

frontend_ui_tests.conto_lavoro_section: PASS - Section header 'Conto Lavoro' with Paintbrush icon and count badge
frontend_ui_tests.cl_existing_entry: PASS - Existing CL shows: tipo, fornitore_nome, RAL badge, righe count, peso totale
frontend_ui_tests.cl_status_badges: PASS - Status badges displayed (da_inviare, inviato, in_lavorazione, rientrato, verificato)
frontend_ui_tests.cl_pdf_button: PASS - PDF preview button for each CL entry (data-testid='cl-preview-{cl_id}')
frontend_ui_tests.cl_email_button: PASS - Email button for each CL entry (data-testid='cl-email-{cl_id}')
frontend_ui_tests.cl_dialog_tipo_select: PASS - Tipo select with options: verniciatura, zincatura, sabbiatura, altro (data-testid='cl-tipo')
frontend_ui_tests.cl_dialog_fornitore_select: PASS - Fornitore dropdown populated from anagrafica (data-testid='cl-fornitore')
frontend_ui_tests.cl_dialog_ral_input: PASS - RAL input visible for verniciatura (data-testid='cl-ral')
frontend_ui_tests.cl_dialog_righe_table: PASS - Table with columns: Descrizione, Qtà, U.M., Peso (kg)
frontend_ui_tests.cl_dialog_submit_button: PASS - 'Crea DDT Conto Lavoro' submit button (data-testid='btn-confirm-cl')

critical_code_review_comments: Conto Lavoro CRUD endpoints correctly implemented in /app/backend/routes/commessa_ops.py (lines 785-962)
PDF generation uses generate_cl_pdf function in /app/backend/services/pdf_procurement.py (lines 456-617)
Email sending uses send_email_with_attachment from email_service.py (lines 354-400)
Frontend CommessaOpsPanel.js CL dialog (lines 1669-1755) includes all required form fields
CL list view (lines 858-893) shows tipo, fornitore, RAL, righe count, peso, PDF and Email buttons
Status transitions work correctly: da_inviare -> inviato -> in_lavorazione -> rientrato -> verificato
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test sessions
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa with CL entry, test fornitore with email, company_settings - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conto Lavoro DDT feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro (create CL with righe), POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/preview-pdf (generate DDT PDF), POST /api/commesse/{cid}/conto-lavoro/{cl_id}/send-email (send to supplier). Frontend dialog at CommessaOpsPanel.js lines 1669-1755. CL is embedded in commessa document under conto_lavoro array. Important data-testids: btn-new-cl, cl-tipo, cl-fornitore, cl-ral, cl-causale, cl-riga-desc-{idx}, cl-add-riga, cl-note, btn-confirm-cl, cl-preview-{cl_id}, cl-email-{cl_id}.
